name: Bank of America Corporation Bank of America Corporation Depositary Shares (Each representing a 1/1200th Interest in a Share of Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series 5)
summary: Bank of America Corporation Depositary Shares represent a fractional interest in a share of Floating Rate Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series 5. These depositary shares trade on the stock exchange and represent ownership in a portion of Bank of America's preferred stock. Holders are entitled to a proportional share of the dividends and other rights associated with the underlying preferred stock.
